headline: Canadian insurance market is competitive but complex, Aon's Spring 2026 Market Update
summary: Aon plc (NYSE: AON), a leading global professional services firm, has released its Spring 2026 Canadian Insurance Market Update. Published in support of Aon's ongoing commitment to help Canadian clients make better decisions about risk management and insurance programs, the report finds that the Canadian Property and Casualty (P&C) market enters 2026 from a position of strength, underpinned by solid capitalization, strong underwriting performance and a competitive landscape that continues to gro

content.title: Canadian insurance market is competitive but complex, Aon's Spring 2026 Market Update

thumbnail.caption:
Aon plc (NYSE: AON) exists to shape decisions for the better — to protect and enrich the lives of people around the world. Through actionable analytic insight, globally integrated Risk Capital and Human Capital expertise, and locally relevant solutions, our colleagues in over 120 countries provide our clients with the clarity and confidence to make better risk and people decisions that protect and grow their businesses.

 

Follow Aon on LinkedIn, X, Facebook and Instagram. Stay up-to-date by visiting Aon’s newsroom and sign up for news alerts here. (PRNewsfoto/Aon plc)
